requirements.summary: Change the blinking cursor indicator color on the current character position in the typing test to a distinct, visually appealing color (e.g., amber/yellow or white) by updating the relevant CSS keyframe animation and/or `.current` character highlight class in frontend/src/index.css
acceptanceCriteria: The blinking cursor on the current character position uses a new, distinct color different from the previous one.
The blink animation still functions correctly (cursor visibly blinks/pulses).
The new color is consistent with the overall dark navy/cyan design theme.
No other character highlight states (correct/incorrect/pending) are affected.

file_operations.description: Update the `.current` character highlight class and any associated keyframe animations (e.g., `@keyframes blink` or `@keyframes pulse`) to change the blinking cursor color from the current color to a bright accent color such as amber (oklch(0.85 0.15 85)) or white (oklch(1 0 0)). Ensure the animation timing and visibility remain unchanged, and verify that correct (green), incorrect (red), and pending character highlight classes are not affected by this change.
